name: Soudzoukakia (Sausage Rolls in Wine Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
- Place bread in a medium-sized bowl and moisten with wine. Add remaining ingredients for the sausage rolls and mix thoroughly.
- Form the mixture into rolls about 2 inches long using your hands. Continue this procedure until all the mixture is used.
- Place rolls on a broiling pan and broil, turning once, until browned. Drain on paper towels and set aside.
- WINE SAUCE
- In a 4-quart saucepan, mix tomato puree (16 oz.), water, dry wine, sugar, cinnamon stick, bay leaf, salt, and pepper to taste.
- Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat to low. Add sausage rolls and return to a boil. Cover the saucepan, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 30 more minutes.
